title: englerophytum koulamoutouense

The roots of Englerophytum koulamoutouense contain various alkaloids, including coumarin and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The leaves, on the other hand, contain terpenoids and phenolic compounds, such as ferulic acid and quercetin, which have been demonstrated to possess antimicrobial and anti-diabetic activities. side_effects: Englerophytum koulamoutouense can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness.
